name: Wellington Drive Technologies Limited
summary: Wellington Drive Technologies Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, markets, and sells energy saving and electronically commutated (EC) motors, controllers, and fans; and develops Internet of Things solutions and software worldwide. It offers ECR refrigeration fan motors, refrigeration fan assemblies, fractional horsepower ventilation fan motors, and AirMoVent shaded pole Q-motors; refrigeration control solutions, including Connect SCS range of products that are a family of intelligent electronic thermostats and energy management devices for commercial refrigeration systems; and SCS Connect System, a fleet management system for point of sale refrigeration equipment. The company also provides proximity marketing solutions comprising iPX Platform that connects customer's digital marketing efforts to SCS beacons or other proximity devices; Mobile Coupon Factory, which operates as an online agency that facilitates in the design, development, and deployment of integrated mobile marketing solutions; ScreenSmarts, which integrates with digital media screens to silently detect the presence of customers and interrupt normal sign content programming to display personalized contextual offers or information. Its products are used in supermarket and supermarket refrigeration, beverage merchandising, and food service applications. The company was formerly known as Cadac Limited and changed its name to Wellington Drive Technologies Limited in September 1996. Wellington Drive Technologies Limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.
